name: ripvec
description: Semantic code search + multi-language LSP + knowledge-graph skill index. 21 grammars, 26 extensions, function-level PageRank, hybrid BM25+vector ranking. Model2Vec static encoder + TinyBERT cross-encoder reranker, CPU-only. 4.1.13: fix MCP project-root default — server now honors CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR (set by Claude Code) before falling back to current_dir, and the plugin shim no longer cd's into the plugin install dir, so tool calls without an explicit `root` resolve against the user's session repo instead of the plugin cache. 4.1.12: focus-PageRank recalibrated (α 0.15 → 0.35). 4.1.10: knowledge-graph skill index. 4.1.0: find_dead_code MCP tool. 4.0.1: token_budget allocation for get_repo_map. 4.0: LSP-shaped composability — every tool returns lsp_location; every position tool accepts it.
